title: T-015 — Seed fifo_strategy_v1 DSL rule (WH §9.1, §9.3, ADR-029)
prompt:
# T-015 — Seed fifo_strategy_v1 DSL rule (WH §9.1, §9.3, ADR-029)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §9.1, §9.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Seed `fifo_strategy_v1` for non-expiring goods (packaging/supplies) — ORDER BY created_at ASC, same qa_status whitelist. Default `items.picking_strategy` for products with no expiry.

## Implementation contract
1. Seed `packages/db/src/seeds/fifo-strategy-v1.ts` upserting rule_id='fifo_strategy_v1', kind='pick_strategy', payload (sort by created_at ASC only).
2. Same `runPickStrategy` helper as T-014 reads payload generically.
3. Version 1.0; admin read-only per ADR-029.

## Files
- packages/db/seed/rules/fifo-strategy-v1.json [create]
- packages/db/seed/rules/fifo-strategy-v1.seed.ts [create]
- packages/db/seed/rules/__tests__/fifo-strategy-v1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the seed runs, when rule_registry is queried for `rule_id='fifo_strategy_v1'`, then version=1 and payload sort = [{col:'created_at',dir:'asc'}].
2. Given a product with `picking_strategy='fifo'`, when the FEFO/FIFO query runs, then fifo_strategy_v1 is loaded and applied.

## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/src/seeds/__tests__/fifo-strategy-v1.test.ts` asserting payload + helper application.
- Run `pnpm --filter db test fifo-strategy-v1`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not include `expiry_date` in fifo sort — FIFO is by-receipt date only.
- Do not hardcode strategy choice in services.

## Dependencies
- T-002
